Title: Invoice totals move to precomputed storage
Release: fixture
Source: synthetic validation fixture, not GitLab data

Invoice totals are now precomputed and stored alongside each invoice
record instead of being calculated at read time. A forward-only migration
rewrites existing invoices into the new shape during upgrade. The public
API returns the stored totals field, and any client that recomputed
totals locally should switch to it. Rounding now happens once at write
time, so figures displayed across the product come from a single stored
value.
